hero.badge: Open Source · Self-Hosted · Cloud, On-Prem & Local
hero.description: Automatically discover your infrastructure — cloud, on-premise, or local — build a living dependency graph, and query everything through a {highlight}.
howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1.title: Deploy
howItWorks.step1.desc: Run the setup wizard and provide credentials. CIG deploys inside your own infrastructure — cloud, on-prem, or local.
howItWorks.step2.title: Discover
howItWorks.step2.desc: CIG crawls your environments, mapping every resource, dependency, and relationship automatically.
howItWorks.step3.title: Visualize
howItWorks.step3.desc: Explore an interactive graph of your entire infrastructure with real-time topology views.
howItWorks.step4.title: Converse
howItWorks.step4.desc: Ask questions in plain English — "Which services depend on this DB?" — and get instant answers.
features.title: Core Capabilities
features.discovery.title: Universal Discovery
features.discovery.desc: Cloud (AWS, GCP, Azure), on-premise servers, and local environments — map all your compute resources in one unified graph.
features.graph.title: Infrastructure Graph
features.graph.desc: Neo4j-backed graph model that captures every dependency, relationship, and metadata attribute.
features.chat.title: Conversational Queries
features.chat.desc: Natural language interface powered by LLMs — ask anything about your infrastructure in plain English.
features.security.title: Security Insights
features.security.desc: Identify misconfigurations, overly permissive IAM roles, and exposed resources instantly.
features.dashboard.title: Real-Time Dashboard
features.dashboard.desc: Interactive topology visualization with live updates, cost breakdowns, and resource health metrics.
features.selfHosted.title: Self-Hosted & Private
features.selfHosted.desc: Runs entirely inside your infrastructure — whether that's a cloud VPC, an on-prem data center, or a local workstation.
architecture.title: Architecture Overview
architecture.footer: All components deploy inside your own environment — cloud, on-prem, or local. Zero external dependencies, full data sovereignty.
cta.title: Ready to map your infrastructure?
cta.desc: Get early access or jump straight into the self-hosted deployment. Open-source, free forever.
authed.desc: Select a module below to jump directly into your infrastructure intelligence dashboard.
authed.carouselHint: Drag to explore · tap once to preview · tap again to open
authed.graph.title: Infrastructure Graph
authed.graph.desc: Visualize dependencies across your entire infrastructure as an interactive node graph
authed.resources.title: Resources
authed.resources.desc: Browse, search, and filter all discovered cloud and on-premise resources
authed.costs.title: Cost Analysis
authed.costs.desc: Track spending trends and identify savings opportunities across providers
authed.security.title: Security
authed.security.desc: Detect misconfigurations and compliance violations with automated scoring
authed.console.title: AI Console
authed.console.desc: Query your infrastructure in natural language — ask anything about your resources
authed.discovery.title: Discovery
authed.discovery.desc: Auto-discover cloud, on-premise, and container infrastructure in minutes
authed.graph.detail.headline: See your entire infrastructure as a living, interactive map.
authed.graph.detail.highlights.0: Node graph powered by Neo4j — every resource is a node, every dependency an edge
authed.graph.detail.highlights.1: Real-time updates as your infrastructure changes
authed.graph.detail.highlights.2: Filter by provider, region, type, or health status
authed.graph.detail.highlights.3: Click any node to inspect full metadata and connected resources
authed.graph.detail.highlights.4: Export graph snapshots as SVG or JSON
authed.graph.detail.useCases.0: Trace blast radius before a deployment or change
authed.graph.detail.useCases.1: Debug service-level failures by following dependency chains
authed.resources.detail.headline: A unified inventory of every resource across all your environments.
authed.resources.detail.highlights.0: Browse resources from AWS, GCP, Azure, and on-prem in one view
authed.resources.detail.highlights.1: Full-text search with field-level filters (tag, region, type, status)
authed.resources.detail.highlights.2: Resource detail panels with live metadata and relationship context
authed.resources.detail.useCases.0: Audit all resources tagged to a project or cost center
authed.resources.detail.useCases.1: Identify orphaned or untagged resources wasting budget
authed.resources.detail.useCases.2: Find all instances of a specific AMI or image across regions
authed.costs.detail.headline: Understand exactly where your cloud budget is going.
authed.costs.detail.highlights.0: Cost trends across providers with daily, weekly, and monthly breakdowns
authed.costs.detail.highlights.1: Top-N spenders by resource, service, and team
authed.costs.detail.highlights.2: Anomaly detection — automatically flag unexpected spend spikes
authed.costs.detail.highlights.3: Savings recommendations: reserved instances, right-sizing, idle resources
authed.costs.detail.highlights.4: Tag-based cost allocation mapped to your org structure
authed.costs.detail.useCases.0: Prepare FinOps reports for engineering and finance teams
authed.costs.detail.useCases.1: Set budget alerts and forecast next-month spend
authed.costs.detail.useCases.2: Compare cost impact before and after an architectural change
authed.security.detail.headline: Continuous compliance and misconfiguration detection across your entire stack.
authed.security.detail.highlights.0: Automated scoring against CIS, SOC 2, and custom rule sets
authed.security.detail.highlights.1: IAM policy analyzer — detect over-permissive roles and public access
authed.security.detail.highlights.2: Network exposure map — find resources open to the public internet
authed.security.detail.highlights.3: Prioritized findings sorted by severity and blast radius
authed.security.detail.highlights.4: One-click remediation guidance with infrastructure-as-code snippets
authed.security.detail.useCases.0: Prepare for a SOC 2 or ISO 27001 audit
authed.security.detail.useCases.1: Catch misconfigured S3 buckets or storage accounts before a breach
authed.security.detail.useCases.2: Enforce least-privilege IAM policies at scale
authed.console.detail.headline: Talk to your infrastructure like you talk to a colleague.
authed.console.detail.highlights.0: Natural language queries translated to graph traversals and SQL
authed.console.detail.highlights.1: Context-aware — the AI knows your resource inventory and graph topology
authed.console.detail.highlights.2: Answers include resource links, cost data, and security context
authed.console.detail.highlights.3: Supports follow-up questions and multi-turn conversations
authed.console.detail.highlights.4: Powered by your choice of LLM — self-hosted or cloud
authed.console.detail.useCases.0: "Which services will break if I delete this database?"
authed.console.detail.useCases.1: "What is the most expensive resource in us-east-1 this month?"
authed.console.detail.useCases.2: "List all EC2 instances without a backup policy."
authed.discovery.detail.headline: Zero-config discovery that maps your entire infrastructure in minutes.
authed.discovery.detail.highlights.0: Agent-less discovery via cloud provider APIs (AWS, GCP, Azure)
authed.discovery.detail.highlights.1: On-premise and bare-metal support via lightweight scan agents
authed.discovery.detail.highlights.3: Continuous re-discovery keeps the graph up to date automatically
authed.discovery.detail.highlights.4: Multi-account and multi-cloud discovery in a single run
authed.discovery.detail.useCases.0: Bootstrap a complete asset inventory from scratch in under an hour
authed.discovery.detail.useCases.1: Detect shadow IT — resources created outside your IaC pipeline
authed.discovery.detail.useCases.2: Map container workloads alongside the underlying cloud infrastructure
